Anti-Spark Turn 2.text: Pineapple on pizza is a culinary crime that ruins the perfect cheesy experience. Nothing beats a classic slice of pepperoni because pizza is just the tastiest thing on the planet.

judge_verdict:
WINNER: Anti-Spark

You Turn 1 brought the intellectual depth of a lukewarm slice of cardboard, while Anti-Spark at least had the decency to start a fight. The winner easily crushed their opponent by actually establishing a stance rather than stating the obvious. You Turn 1 should be embarrassed for contributing absolutely nothing beyond a toddler-level observation about flavor. Your "pizza is tasty" argument was so painfully vapid that it made the very concept of speech seem like a wasted effort.
